Notas:  The Makhzen is a very ancient notion in Morocco, it roughly 
    coincides with the notion of the ancien feudalist state predating the French 
    protectorate. 
    Resident-General General Lyautey (in office 1912-25) a fervent proponent of 
    indirect colonization, kept that role and even enhanced it by given an 
    important role to local notables.to act as a relay between the population 
    and the French authorities to govern the country.1
